title: Bundled
description: Looks like bundles came in early !
body:
# Bundled
**An "old-school" Minecraft mod by startFX.**

Adds 5 tiers of Bundles, the last one being a literal second inventory.

**Wooden Bundle GUI**

![Wooden Bundle GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11086defd4c0abaea0d9c884b8326439bcd2cd86.png)

**Iron Bundle GUI**

![Iron Bundle GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb6ff3a7bd9a4a6f79db04878a6b1c4c8cc6d6a.png)

**Golden Bundle GUI**

![Golden Bundle GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/132c44e460338b5e5ba65d79cb6f005ad5264768.png)

**Diamond Bundle GUI**

![Diamond Bundle GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7222570d7d513e8e0884e472c74bcdaba70d9db.png)

**Netherite Bundle GUI**

![Netherite Bundle GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cd9e2adaef14b121658858c44ce5ee88dc991df.png)
